mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_profile (job_title, job_family, description, hard_skills, soft_skills, cert_requirements, ability_model, salary_range, career_path, source_job_ids, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{jobTitle}, #{jobFamily}, #{description}, #{hardSkills}, #{softSkills}, #{certRequirements}, #{abilityModel}, #{salaryRange}, #{careerPath}, #{sourceJobIds}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE job_profile SET job_family = #{jobFamily}, description = #{description}, hard_skills = #{hardSkills}, soft_skills = #{softSkills}, cert_requirements = #{certRequirements}, ability_model = #{abilityModel}, salary_range = #{salaryRange}, career_path = #{careerPath}, source_job_ids = #{sourceJobIds}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM job_profile WHERE job_title = #{jobTitle} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM job_profile ORDER BY id
